risks.description: 5/6 products have no troubleshooting symptoms; recovery-path resolution is blocked.
2 products lack warnings; mandatory-warning-surface safeguard cannot fire.
Per-procedure checkpoint declarations are not yet authored in the knowledge-core; recovery anchors are heuristic.
Procedures do not yet declare validation-predicates; completion currently inferred from terminal state alone.
Steps do not yet carry `confirmation_required` flags; assistants would need conservative defaults.
Intent vs operational-state coherence checking is contractual; no live detector yet.
Execution traces require knowledge-core snapshot hash for determinism; awaiting lifecycle integration.
Cross-product entity/terminology collisions block uniform state-model application across products.
